Part.Source:
Event Start
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
&MaxStepsToShow = 11 &MaxStepsToShowInXS = 5
&SelectedStepNumber = 1 for &WizardStep in &WizardSteps if &WizardStep.Code = &CurrentStep exit else &SelectedStepNumber += 1 endif endfor &StepRealNumber = 1
&WizardStepsAux = &WizardSteps.Clone() &FirstIsDummy = False &SecondIsDummy = False &PenultimateIsDummy = False &LastIsDummy = False If &WizardStepsAux.Count > &MaxStepsToShow If &SelectedStepNumber > &WizardStepsAux.Count &SelectedStepNumber = 1 EndIf &StartIndex = 1 If &SelectedStepNumber + 3 - &MaxStepsToShow / 2 > 0 &StartIndex = &SelectedStepNumber + 3 - &MaxStepsToShow / 2 If &StartIndex + (&MaxStepsToShow - 2) > &WizardStepsAux.Count + 1 &StartIndex = &WizardStepsAux.Count - (&MaxStepsToShow - 2) + 1 EndIf EndIf If &StartIndex > 3 &StepRealNumber = &StartIndex &FirstIsDummy = True &SecondIsDummy = True &WizardStepsAux.Item(2).Title = !'...' Do while &StartIndex > 3 &WizardStepsAux.Remove(3) &StartIndex -= 1 &SelectedStepNumber -= 1 Enddo EndIf
If &WizardStepsAux.Count > &MaxStepsToShow &LastIsDummy = True &PenultimateIsDummy = True &WizardStepsAux.Item(&WizardStepsAux.Count - 1).Title = '' Do while &WizardStepsAux.Count > &MaxStepsToShow &WizardStepsAux.Remove(&WizardStepsAux.Count - 2) Enddo EndIf EndIf
&WizardStepsCount = &WizardStepsAux.Count If &WizardStepsAux.Count > &MaxStepsToShowInXS &WizardStepsItem = new() &WizardStepsItem.Title = !"DummiesXS_Test" &WizardStepsItem.Code = !"FirstDummyXS" &WizardStepsAux.Add(&WizardStepsItem, 2)
&WizardStepsItem = new() &WizardStepsItem.Title = !"DummiesXS_Test" &WizardStepsItem.Code = !"LastDummyXS" &WizardStepsAux.Add(&WizardStepsItem, &WizardStepsAux.Count - 1) EndIf &StepNumber = 1
EndEvent
Event GridWizardSteps.Load
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
StepNumber.Visible = false StepNumber.Caption = &StepRealNumber.ToFormattedString() TableStepBulletLineLeft.Class = StyleClass:TableStepBulletLine TableStepBulletLineRight.Class = StyleClass:TableStepBulletLine
TblContainerStep.Class = StyleClass:TableContainerStepBullet
If &SelectedStepNumber <> &StepNumber And &WizardStepsAux.CurrentItem.Code <> !"FirstDummyXS" And &WizardStepsAux.CurrentItem.Code <> !"LastDummyXS" And &StepNumber > 1 And &StepNumber < &WizardStepsCount If &SelectedStepNumber <= 3 And &StepNumber > 3 TblContainerStep.Class = TblContainerStep.Class + !" hidden-xs" Endif If &SelectedStepNumber > 3 And &StepNumber > 1 And &SelectedStepNumber < &WizardStepsCount - 2 TblContainerStep.Class = TblContainerStep.Class + !" hidden-xs" Endif If &SelectedStepNumber >= &WizardStepsCount - 2 And &StepNumber < &WizardStepsCount - 2 TblContainerStep.Class = TblContainerStep.Class + !" hidden-xs" Endif EndIf
Do Case Case &StepNumber < &SelectedStepNumber TableStepItem.Class = StyleClass:TableStepBulletChecked TableStepBulletLineLeft.Class = StyleClass:TableStepBulletLineChecked TableStepBulletLineRight.Class = StyleClass:TableStepBulletLineChecked WizardStepsAux__Title.Class = StyleClass:AttributeStepBullet Case &StepNumber = &SelectedStepNumber StepNumber.Visible = true StepNumber.Class = StyleClass:StepNumberBulletSelected TableStepItem.Class = StyleClass:TableStepBulletSelected TableStepBulletLineLeft.Class = StyleClass:TableStepBulletLineChecked WizardStepsAux__Title.Class = StyleClass:AttributeStepBulletSelected Case &StepNumber > &SelectedStepNumber StepNumber.Class = StyleClass:StepNumberBullet StepNumber.Visible = true TableStepItem.Class = StyleClass:TableStepBullet WizardStepsAux__Title.Class = StyleClass:AttributeStepBulletUnSelected EndCase
TblContainerStep.Visible = True If Not &WizardStepsAux.CurrentItem.Code.Contains(!"DummyXS") Do Case Case &StepNumber = 1 AND &FirstIsDummy StepNumber.Caption = &StepNumber.ToString().Trim() Case &StepNumber = &WizardStepsCount AND &LastIsDummy StepNumber.Caption = &WizardSteps.Count.ToString().Trim() Case (&StepNumber = &WizardStepsCount - 1 AND &PenultimateIsDummy) StepNumber.Caption = !'...' Case &StepNumber = 2 AND &FirstIsDummy //do nothing Otherwise &StepRealNumber += 1 EndCase &StepNumber += 1 Else StepNumber.Caption = !"..." TblContainerStep.Class = !"TableContainerStepBullet hidden-sm hidden-lg hidden-md" If (&SelectedStepNumber <= 3 And &WizardStepsAux.CurrentItem.Code = !"FirstDummyXS") Or (&SelectedStepNumber >= &WizardStepsCount - 2 And &WizardStepsAux.CurrentItem.Code = !"LastDummyXS") TblContainerStep.Visible = False EndIf If (&SelectedStepNumber > 3 And &WizardStepsAux.CurrentItem.Code = !"FirstDummyXS") TableStepItem.Class = StyleClass:TableStepExtraBulletChecked StepNumber.Visible = true EndIf EndIf
EndEvent
